title: neolitsea gracilipes
intro: Neolitsea gracilipes is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential applications in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neolitsea gracilipes include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of common colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Neolitsea gracilipes often involve the leaves being steamed or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
